error.pluginNotInstalled: Please install Aitoearn browser plugin first
error.publishingInProgress: Publishing in progress, please try again later

header.downloadDescription: The AiToEarn browser plugin is specifically designed for the intelligent operation of Xiaohongshu. Please click the button below to download and install.
header.activeDescription: Your browser plugin is activated. You can start using the publish feature!
header.xhsNotLoggedInTip: Fetching note details requires logging in to the <homeLink>Xiaohongshu homepage</homeLink>. Publishing also requires the <creatorLink>Xiaohongshu Creator Center</creatorLink>.
header.xhsHomeLoggedInOnlyTip: The Xiaohongshu homepage is logged in, so note details can be fetched now. To publish, please also log in to the Creator Center.
header.xhsCreatorLoggedInOnlyTip: The Xiaohongshu Creator Center is logged in, but note details still cannot be fetched. Please log in to the homepage first.
header.permissionDescription: Plugin is installed but requires necessary permissions to work properly. Please grant the required permissions in your browser extension settings.
header.xhsCreatorQuickLoginTip: After logging in on the Xiaohongshu homepage, the Creator Center can be logged in with one click.
header.viewInstallGuide: View Browser Plugin Installation Guide (Manual Install)

mobile.title: Desktop Only
mobile.description: The browser extension is not available on mobile devices. Please use a desktop browser to install and use the extension.
mobile.introduction: AiToEarn platform browser extension. Works with AiToEarn web to automate interactions on Xiaohongshu, TikTok and other platforms — follow, like, bookmark, comment and more.

version.title: Plugin Version
version.description: Your installed plugin version is shown here and compared with the latest version required by the site.
version.popoverTitle: Plugin can be updated to v{{version}}
version.updateDescription: Your current plugin version is not the latest. Update soon to avoid feature gaps or compatibility issues.
version.googleStoreNotice: Extensions installed from the Chrome Web Store update automatically. If you do not urgently need specific features, you can wait about a week for the store update. If you need certain features right away, update the plugin manually.
version.googleStoreShortNotice: Chrome Web Store installs update automatically
version.latestDescription: Your plugin is already on the latest version and can continue to be used normally.
version.unavailableDescription: The plugin version could not be read right now. Please reopen this dialog and try again later.
